user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add an income tax slab with a range and rate, so that payroll can calculate tax correctly per income bracket
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Income Tax Slabs screen; When I click Add / Edit Income Tax Slab and enter a range from, range to and income tax rate; Then the slab is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing tax slab, so that I can update its range boundaries or tax rate
acceptance_criteria: Given a tax slab is listed; When I click Edit and modify its range or rate; Then the updated slab is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want the system to ensure tax slab ranges are configured without gaps, so that every income amount is covered by a rate
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring tax slabs; When I save slabs that leave a gap between ranges; Then I am warned that all tax slab ranges must be configured without any gap

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view tax slabs with their range from, range to and rate, so that I can review the full tax structure
acceptance_criteria: Given tax slabs exist; When I open the Income Tax Slabs screen; Then each slab shows range from, range to and income tax rate

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter tax slabs by financial year, so that I see the slabs applicable to the selected year
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Income Tax Slabs screen; When I select a financial year; Then only slabs configured for that year are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the tax slabs list, so that I always see the latest saved configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the current data
